projects.name: QA Automation Template
projects.what_tested: API endpoints, web UI flows, and framework-level unit coverage within a single structured project.
projects.why_it_matters: Demonstrates how a production-ready framework is designed — with clear separation of concerns, reusable fixtures, and CI-linked reporting that makes quality evidence easy to evaluate.
projects.application: Reusable framework architecture with API, web UI, and unit layers in one portfolio-ready project.

projects.name: Playwright Automation
projects.what_tested: Browser-based UI flows across 12 focused spec files: forms, navigation, auth, accessibility, content interaction, error handling, performance, and search — each with a single clear responsibility.
projects.why_it_matters: Demonstrates modern Playwright patterns — role- and text-based locators, built-in auto-waiting, and parallel execution — in a suite that stays readable and low-flakiness without a heavyweight framework layer.
projects.application: Fast browser automation for smoke and feature coverage with modern locator and reporting patterns.

projects.name: Selenium Automation
projects.what_tested: Cross-browser UI coverage including page interactions and regression flows using maintainable page object patterns.
projects.why_it_matters: Demonstrates established cross-browser automation discipline with clean abstraction between test logic and page interaction.
projects.application: Classic cross-browser UI coverage using maintainable page objects and regression workflows.

projects.name: API Testing with Pytest
projects.what_tested: REST API contracts, response schemas, status handling, and error paths — tested directly against a deployed FastAPI backend on Render.
projects.why_it_matters: Validates that APIs behave correctly at the contract level before UI or integration tests — catching defects early and cheaply.
projects.application: API-level validation for contracts, status handling, and business-critical response assertions.

projects.name: Postman API Testing
projects.what_tested: API workflows, chained request sequences, environment-specific configuration, and contract assertions — including a full posts CRUD flow against the Render backend.
projects.why_it_matters: Shareable, team-friendly API verification that integrates directly into CI and enables non-developers to inspect test logic.
projects.application: API workflow validation and shareable collection-based checks for team collaboration and quick verification.

projects.name: Appium Mobile Automation
projects.what_tested: Mobile application flows including UI element interaction, navigation, and end-to-end scenario coverage.
projects.why_it_matters: Extends automation discipline into the mobile layer, demonstrating stable element handling and repeatable execution on device and emulator targets.
projects.application: Mobile test coverage focused on stable element handling and repeatable end-to-end checks.

projects.name: k6 Performance Testing
projects.what_tested: System behaviour under load, stress, spike, and soak conditions with configurable virtual user ramps.
projects.why_it_matters: Gives teams and reviewers measurable performance thresholds with published results, surfacing capacity risks before they reach production.
projects.application: Load, stress, spike, and soak scenarios with threshold-driven reporting for performance risk visibility.
